title: Combining whole teams "my work" boards into one big tracking board
excerpt: I would like to gather all the team members “my work” ( or every task related board) and have them all on one board ( high ranking board?) in order to use the date in different ways. I want to track progress, capacity, t…

posts.author: AQC (Alexis)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to gather all the team members “my work” ( or every task related board) and have them all on one board ( high ranking board?) in order to use the date in different ways. I want to track progress, capacity, time line and due dates?
Is there a way I can do this?

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Alexis,
You could set up something like a “master board” that mirrors tasks from all of your team members’ individual boards into one centralized location. This way, you’ll be able to track everything related to progress, capacity, timeline, and due dates in an organized manner

posts.author: boriskolev (Boris Kolev)
posts.cookedHtml: How can i make this Master board? Do i need to set up automations?
